name: Tonewheel Organ
explanation: A polyphonic additive drawbar organ. Every held key is built from a stack of sine partials tuned to the classic footages (16', 8', 5 1/3', 4', 2 2/3', 2', 1') that you blend with the drawbars, so chords ring as a full console organ. Instant attack and flat sustain while held — no decay — plus a snappy key-click, a single-trigger percussion tap (selectable 2nd or 3rd harmonic), tube drive and a built-in rotary speaker that adds tremolo and a doppler shimmer. Controls: Sub 16', Fund 8', Third 5 1/3', Upper brightness, Percussion, Perc Mode, Drive and Rotary speed.
